items.title: What a harness is and how to build one with Claude Agent SDK

items.title: Der kleine Schritt von Akzeptanzkriterien zu einer KI-Routing-Richtlinie 🇩🇪
items.excerpt: In Kürze: KI-Routing-Richtlinie Sie haben Ihre KI-Routinearbeit auf ein günstigeres Modell verlagert und glauben deshalb, die Kostenfrage sei damit erledigt. Oft ist das jedoch nicht der Fall. Die Entscheidung steckt im Kopf einer einzelnen Person und liefert nichts, was die für die Rechnungen verantwortliche Person lesen könnte. Schlimmer noch: Sie ist eine architektonische Entscheidung, die niemand dokumentiert hat. Die KI-Routing-Richtlinie ist das fehlende Artefakt von Phase 2 des Delegation-Lifecycles: Sie legt fest, welcher Ausführungspfad, von einem günstigeren Modell über ein Frontier-
items.titleJa: 受入基準からAIルーティングポリシーへの進化
items.summaryJa: AIの日常業務を低コストモデルに移行しても、単に個人の頭の中に判断基準が隠れたままでは管理不可能。Delegation Lifecycleフェーズ2に必要な、実行経路を定義するAIルーティングポリシーという見落とされやすいアーティファクトについて解説します。

items.title: [Episode 3] Start Using AI as a Personal Assistant
items.excerpt: "AI-native Scrum Team" is a podcast series that shares how Scrum Teams can effectively take the steps of their AI Transformation journey to become AI-native Scrum Teams. In episode 3, we discussed the following things: 1- How to effectively communicate with AI 2- Use AI as a research assistant 3- Use AI as a writing assistant 4- Use AI as a decision support assistant 5- Use AI as a brainstorming partner 6- Use AI as a productivity booster ... As mentioned in the conversation, you can download the "AI Transformation for Scrum Teams" free playbook here: https://scrumschool.org/ai-transformation-

items.title: From Dependency Loops to Delivery Flow
items.excerpt: A Product Owner’s AI-Augmented Transformation Overview Josua Senz is a Senior Product Owner at a mid-sized German media organization, called MEDIFOX DAN. He has a technical background and works at the company since September 2022. When he attended the PSPO-AIE training in late 2025, he already considered himself well-informed about AI. What he didn’t anticipate was how quickly and systematically his daily work would transform. Within months, Josua had integrated AI tools across the core workflows of his role: prototyping, documentation, user story creation, test design, and data analysis. This
items.titleJa: 依存関係のループから納品フローへ：PO向けAI活用の実践ガイド

items.title: The New AI Operating Model. Start By Using Scrum
items.excerpt: Image CFOs are waking up to an uncomfortable reality. AI spending is climbing steeply, with tokens, agents, licenses, and compute, and the business value is proving surprisingly hard to pinpoint. Uber burned through its entire 2026 AI budget in four months, with its COO publicly struggling to draw a line between AI adoption and the development of meaningful new consumer features. Microsoft has pulled Claude Code licenses from developers as spending on coding agents came under cost governance. In boardrooms and budget reviews across the industry, the same question keeps surfacing: we're produci
items.titleJa: 新しいAI運用モデル：まずはScrum導入から始める
items.summaryJa: 企業のAI支出が急速に増加している一方で、実際のビジネス価値が曖昧なままになっている課題について取り上げています。UberやMicrosoftなどの事例を通じて、AI導入の効果測定や予算管理の難しさが浮き彫りになっており、Scrumを基盤とした適切な運用モデルの構築が求められています。

items.title: Lean Agile Practioner - A Scrum Master competency no one talks about
items.excerpt: When in early 2010's Lyssa Adkins and Michael Spayd came up with the Agile Coaching Competency framework, they clearly mentioned that being a Lean-Agile Practitioner is important for a person to be a successful Agile Coach. And since Scrum Masters are expected to do agile coaching, it remains true for them too. The problem is, in my work with numerous Scrum Teams I have observed that the Scrum Masters have no understanding of what it means to be a Lean Agile Practitioner. A majority of them are simply certified on Scrum (PSM/CSM) and for them agile coaching is all about ensuring Scrum events (
items.titleJa: スクラムマスターに欠けるリーンアジャイル実践能力

items.title: How to Create a Powerful PMO Mission Statement
items.excerpt: There's a lot riding on getting your PMO mission statement right. After all, the mission statement is what will guide the PMO as it strives to achieve its goals and objectives. Creating a powerful PMO mission statement doesn't have to be difficult - but it does require some thought and careful planning. Why have a mission statement for the PMO? The PMO is responsible for ensuring that an organization's projects are well-organized, well-run, and produce the desired results. A key part of a PMO leader's job is to develop and maintain project management standards and processes and to support the
items.titleJa: 強力なPMOミッションステートメントの策定方法

items.title: Just Looking
items.excerpt: In Looking Good, Testers! I made the case that testing is about looking and that delegating the looking to someone or something else involves a risk calculation: do you both understand the task the same way, is the third party likely to carry out the task in the way you requested, how easily can you check any results they give back, could they complement you in some way, how will you keep your knowledge and skills up to date if you don't do this task any more, how much does this task matter, how much do you care about any of that, ...? I didn't say anything there about selecting what to look a
items.titleJa: テスター自身が確認することの重要性
items.summaryJa: テストの本質は「確認する」ことであり、その役割を他者やツールに委譲する際には、理解の一致、実行の正確性、結果検証の容易性など複数のリスク要因を検討する必要があります。自動化やアウトソースの判断には、知識・スキルの維持や業務の重要度など多角的な視点が求められます。

items.excerpt: Summary Andrea Bronzini, a seasoned expert in experimentation and conversion optimization, shares insights on the limitations of traditional A/B testing frameworks, the impact of noise on experiment results, and introduces innovative tools to improve decision-making in product growth.
items.titleJa: A/Bテスト勝者がローンチ後に消える理由
items.summaryJa: 実験・コンバージョン最適化の専門家が、従来型A/Bテストの限界、ノイズが実験結果に与える影響を解説。プロダクト成長における意思決定を改善するための革新的なツールと手法を紹介。
